hero.title: WOODLAND COMPANY LIMITED
hero.subtitle: An international-standard industrial wood supplier in Vietnam, delivering material solutions for premium interiors, export manufacturing and large-scale construction projects.

about.title: WOODLAND COMPANY LIMITED
about.description: WOODLAND is proud to be an international-standard industrial wood supplier in Vietnam, delivering material solutions for projects ranging from premium interiors to manufacturing and large-scale construction. With strong supply capacity, dedicated service and stable quality, our products are ready to meet demanding standards in the United States, Europe, Japan and Korea.

productLibrary.title: Our Products
items: Woodland and the green material trend with premium melamine plywood

items.title: Scale And Supply Capacity
items.description: With the ability to supply more than 500,000 m³ of industrial wood annually, WOODLAND is proud to be one of the leading suppliers in both quality and scale.

items.title: Diverse Product Range
items.description: We specialize in industrial wood products such as plywood, finger-joint wood, MDF and particle board, serving a wide range of domestic and international needs.

items.title: Modern Warehousing
items.description: WOODLAND invests in 10,000m² of standard warehouse space, 5 trucks with 10-ton capacity and 3 heavy-duty forklifts to ensure effective storage and transport.

items.title: Nationwide Delivery
items.description: WOODLAND operates its own delivery team and works with rail, sea and air transport partners to deliver quickly to provinces and cities across Vietnam.

items.title: Quality Commitment
items.description: At WOODLAND, quality control is applied strictly across every production stage. We maintain strong relationships with trusted suppliers to keep raw materials at the right quality and cost level.

items.title: Dedicated Team
items.description: WOODLAND currently has more than 50 employees across Sales, Marketing, Management, Accounting, Warehousing and Transport. Our team is ready to support customers quickly and accurately throughout the working process.

projects.title: Featured Profiles And Visuals
projects.subtitle: Company profile, warehouse operations and product imagery

news.title: Featured News
news.subtitle: Material insights, plywood knowledge and Woodland updates

cta.title: Work With Woodland
cta.subtitle: A partner delivering international-standard industrial wood solutions that add value to your interiors, products and projects.

hero.title: WOODLAND COMPANY LIMITED
hero.subtitle: About
hero.description: WOODLAND supplies plywood, finger-joint wood, MDF and particle board for interior fit-out, construction, manufacturing and export needs.

vision.title: Vision And Mission
vision.description: WOODLAND aims to become a leading international-standard industrial wood supplier in Vietnam through sustainable growth, technology improvement, strict quality control and customer-first service.

mission.title: Quality Assurance And Trusted Service
mission.description: Every product at WOODLAND is checked carefully from raw material selection through finishing. We commit to stable quality, durability, cost efficiency and long-term confidence in every shipment.

portfolio.title: Main Product Portfolio
portfolio.description: WOODLAND supplies multiple industrial wood groups for interior fit-out, export manufacturing and projects requiring stability and visual quality.

items.title: Marine Plywood
items.description: A water-resistant plywood line for outdoor projects or humid environments, offering strong resistance to moisture and decay for long-lasting performance.

items.title: Melamine Plywood
items.description: Its melamine surface helps resist scratches, moisture and dirt, making it a practical choice for modern interiors and visually demanding applications.

items.title: Flexible Plywood
items.description: Designed to bend easily, this plywood is suitable for creative interior designs and curved details that require softer and more distinctive lines.

operations.title: Sustainable Infrastructure System
operations.description: WOODLAND invests in large-scale warehousing and operating systems to preserve goods, handle loading efficiently and respond quickly to both domestic and export demand.
highlights: Around 10,000m² of warehouse area in Binh Duong.
Equipped with 5 trucks with 10-ton capacity and 3 heavy-duty forklifts.
An operating system focused on fast delivery, efficient handling and proper goods preservation.

team.title: Dedicated And Professional Team
team.description: WOODLAND has more than 50 staff across sales, marketing, management, accounting, warehousing and transport. The team is ready to advise quickly, respond accurately and support customers with timely follow-up over the long term.

items.title: Supply Capacity
items.description: More than 500,000 m³ of industrial wood can be supplied annually for domestic and export demand.

items.title: Diverse Categories
items.description: Imported plywood, melamine plywood, Vietnam plywood, finger-joint wood, veneered plywood and MDF.

items.title: Delivery Readiness
items.description: An internal transport team and logistics partners help Woodland respond quickly and deliver on schedule.

items.title: Warehousing And Operations
items.description: Storage, handling and dispatch spaces are organized to support continuous supply and faster fulfillment.

items.title: Products And Applications
items.description: Real product images from plywood, finger-joint wood and other key material groups supplied by WOODLAND.

items.title: People And Service
items.description: Customer support, quotation handling and delivery coordination are structured for fast response and clear communication.

gallery.subtitle: Warehouse, products and operational visuals adapted from the original Woodland website.
